# Scan2Call

Scan2Call is a privacy-first QR identity tag system that helps reunite lost items with their owners. It is a product of ZTAC Group, Australia, and is developed by GrayVally Software Solutions.

## Key Facts
- Product: Scan2Call (QR identity tags and anonymous contact relay)
- Owner: ZTAC Group (Australia)
- Developer: GrayVally Software Solutions (https://grayvally.tech)
- Primary site: https://scan2call.net

## What Scan2Call Does
- Lets finders contact owners without revealing personal details
- Supports phone, SMS, and WhatsApp relay
- Works without an app for the finder

## Important Pages
- Home: https://scan2call.net/
- How it works: https://scan2call.net/how-it-works
- Pricing: https://scan2call.net/pricing
- Store: https://scan2call.net/store
- FAQ: https://scan2call.net/faq
- Privacy: https://scan2call.net/privacy
- Terms: https://scan2call.net/terms
- Contact: https://scan2call.net/contact

## Data & Privacy
- Data residency: Australia (Sydney)
- Privacy policy: https://scan2call.net/privacy

## Contact
- Support: support@scan2call.net
